creator: asmodai@wxs.nl
text:
Makefile was not updated to include man vpo

Fix: 

---
Jeroen Ruigrok van der Werven    A veil of smoke is what I am,
asmodai(at)wxs.nl                         I wait and I wait...
Network/Security Specialist      <http://home.wxs.nl/~asmodai>
BSD & picoBSD: The Power to Serve     <http://www.freebsd.org>--0QeeMKJXdzJ8YHNtr3gvtdDQnVcytzIlrlDbTb5OAQFAtO6q
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- /usr/src/share/man/man4/Makefile.orig       Sun Jan 10 19:18:49 1999
+++ /usr/src/share/man/man4/Makefile    Sun Jan 10 19:19:08 1999
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@
        route.4 sa.4 scsi.4 \
        sd.4 sl.4 smb.4 smbus.4 smp.4 snp.4 sppp.4 ssc.4 st.4 su.4 tcp.4 \
        ttcp.4 termios.4 tty.4 tun.4 udp.4 uk.4 update.4 unix.4 vinum.4
vn.4 \
-       worm.4 wst.4 xpt.4 yp.4 zero.4
+       vpo.4 worm.4 wst.4 xpt.4 yp.4 zero.4
How-To-Repeat: 
        man vpo
